name: Floating Dock
description: A macOS-style floating dock component with smooth icon magnification on hover, creating an app-launcher-like navigation bar.
whenToUse: Use for navigation bars, toolbars, or action menus where you want a polished dock-style interaction with magnification.

props.name: items
props.type: { title: string; icon: React.ReactNode; href: string }[]
props.description: Array of dock items with title, icon, and link

props.name: desktopClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the desktop dock variant

props.name: mobileClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the mobile dock variant
